title: Naughty Arlette
writer: Serge Veber, Peggy Barwell, Edward Dryhurst
actors: Mai Zetterling, Hugh Williams, Margot Grahame
plot: Arlette is a malicious schoolgirl who uses her feminine charms to attract, and then destroy, every man gullible enough to respond to her flirtations. She sets her cap for the art professor and very nearly does him in... but his lo...
